title: CMD.BSP.001.SCO.RECOMPUTE_SCORE — Recompute current behavioural score from a behavioural trigger
description: Payload of the RECOMPUTE_SCORE command. Issued by POL.BSP.001.SCO.ON_BEHAVIOURAL_TRIGGER, handled by AGG.BSP.001.SCO.SCORE_OF_BENEFICIARY, emits RVT.BSP.001.CURRENT_SCORE_RECOMPUTED (always) and RVT.BSP.001.SCORE_THRESHOLD_REACHED (conditional on threshold crossing). Idempotent on trigger.event_id over a 30-day window. Sketch: contracts in this folder mirror the JSON Schemas already produced for resource events under plan/CAP.BSP.001.SCO/contracts/ and would migrate here under the proposed structure.

case_id.description: CORRELATION KEY. Reference to the participation case (Reliever case ID). Identity resolution to OBJ.REF.001.BENEFICIARY_RECORD.internal_id is delegated to consumers via CAP.REF.001.BEN lookup.

event_id.description: IDEMPOTENCY KEY. Identifier of the upstream resource event that triggered this command. Causal link of the resulting domain event.

kind.description: Discriminator. See trigger_kinds in commands.yaml for the upstream event mapping and polarity of each kind.

amount.description: Transaction amount (only for TRANSACTION_AUTHORIZED / TRANSACTION_REFUSED triggers).

category.description: Transaction or signal category (semantic grouping used by the scoring model).

impact_score.description: Pre-computed impact score (only for RELAPSE_SIGNAL / PROGRESSION_SIGNAL triggers, sourced from CAP.BSP.001.SIG).

occurred_at.description: Timestamp of the upstream behavioural fact (ISO-8601, UTC recommended). Used for ordering, NOT for idempotency.
